title: Dual Upload Plugin

userSettings.name: token
userSettings.label: MemoryPlugin Auth Token
userSettings.description: Get your auth token from memoryplugin.com/dashboard.

pluginFunctions.name: dual_upload

openaiSpec.name: dual_upload

text.description: REQUIRED. The full text content to store in memory and upload as a file to Google Drive. Keep the markdown format intact.

folderId.description: REQUIRED. The Google Drive folder ID where the file should be uploaded.

fileName.description: Optional: The name of the file to create in Google Drive (e.g. 'notes.md'). Defaults to 'Untitled.md' if not provided.

bucketId.description: Optional: MemoryPlugin bucket ID to organize this memory.

openaiSpec.description:
DO NOT USE THIS PLUGIN UNLESS EXPLICITLY INSTRUCTED BY THE SYSTEM OR USER PROMPT. If instructions mention uploading to memory and drive without naming this plugin, use other plugins first. 

Uploads a single block of text simultaneously to MemoryPlugin (as a memory) and Google Drive (as a markdown file) in a single action. Specify the text, Drive folder ID, and optional Drive file name and Memory bucket ID.

overviewMarkdown:
## Dual Upload Plugin

This plugin allows you to upload text simultaneously to MemoryPlugin and a specified Google Drive folder in a single step.

### Usage

DO NOT use this plugin unless explicitly requested. If the prompt does not specifically ask for "Dual Upload Plugin", use the regular Memory or Drive plugins instead.
